name: Kelly 32 leather handbag
description:
Hermès Kelly 32 Bag – Vintage 1991 piece- Gold Courchevel Leather with Gold Hardware
Timeless and elegant, this Hermès Kelly 32 is crafted from durable Courchevel leather in a rich brown shade, beautifully complemented by classic gold-plated hardware. Known for its refined cross-grain texture and exceptional structure, Courchevel leather was widely used by Hermès in the 1980s and 1990s and remains highly regarded for its resistance to scratches and ability to maintain the Kelly’s iconic silhouette.
The bag features the signature top handle design, a structured trapezoid shape, and the classic turn-lock closure with clochette. The warm brown tone paired with gold hardware creates a versatile and sophisticated look suitable for both day and evening wear.
Sized at 32 cm, this Kelly offers generous interior space while maintaining the refined proportions that make the style so iconic. The interior is lined in coordinating leather and provides practical storage for daily essentials. Date code circle U (made in 1991). Comes with clotchette, padlock and keys. 

SKU00580000
